name: taskflow
description: TaskFlow — project and task management for small teams

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w server && npm run test:coverage -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
scripts.format: npm run format -w client && npm run format -w server
scripts.rate-limit:reset: docker exec taskflow-redis redis-cli EVAL "local k=redis.call('keys','rl:*'); for i=1,#k do redis.call('del',k[i]) end return #k" 0
